category_sources: source_facts.description says HAProxy is a reliable, high performance TCP/HTTP load balancer.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official haproxy.org site and source_facts.name is haproxy.
docs_sources: Official HAProxy documentation domain and the official haproxy.org docs section are dedicated documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official haproxy.org source distribution points to the HAProxy upstream project, whose official git browser is git.haproxy.org.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies TCP/HTTP load balancing; official HAProxy docs describe proxying and high-availability use cases.
